blinded.name: Blinded
blinded.note: All terrain is difficult terrain. Auto-fail sight-based checks. Flat-check 11 to target (5 if adjacent). Off-guard to all.

broken.name: Broken
broken.note: Item can't be used for normal function until Repaired.

clumsy.name: Clumsy
clumsy.note: -N penalty to Dex-based checks and DCs (per rank). Effects shown are per rank.

concealed.name: Concealed
concealed.note: Flat-check DC 5 to target this creature.

confused.name: Confused
confused.note: Off-guard. Can't use reactions. Attacks random target (ally or enemy). Spends all actions Striking or casting offensive cantrips.

dazzled.name: Dazzled
dazzled.note: Everything is concealed to you (flat-check DC 5 to target).

deafened.name: Deafened
deafened.note: -2 status penalty to Perception. Auto-fail hearing-based checks. Must succeed DC 5 flat check to cast with verbal components.

doomed.name: Doomed
doomed.note: Dying value at which you die is reduced by N. Cannot be removed by rest, only magic.

drained.name: Drained
drained.note: -N penalty to Con-based checks. Max HP reduced by N x level. Effects shown are per rank.

dying.name: Dying
dying.note: Unconscious. Must make recovery checks. Die at dying 4 (reduced by doomed). Effects are special (recovery roll logic).

enfeebled.name: Enfeebled
enfeebled.note: -N penalty to Str-based checks and DCs. Effects shown are per rank.

fascinated.name: Fascinated
fascinated.note: -2 status penalty to Perception and skill checks. Can't use concentrate actions that don't involve the subject.

fatigued.name: Fatigued
fatigued.note: -1 to AC and saving throws. Can't explore. Recovers after full night's rest.

off_guard.name: Off-Guard
off_guard.note: -2 circumstance penalty to AC. Remaster term for flat-footed.

fleeing.name: Fleeing
fleeing.note: Must spend all actions trying to escape the source. Can't Delay or Ready.

frightened.name: Frightened
frightened.note: -N status penalty to all checks and DCs. Reduces by 1 at end of each turn. Effects shown are per rank.

grabbed.name: Grabbed
grabbed.note: Off-guard and immobilized. Can attempt to Escape.

hidden.name: Hidden
hidden.note: Creature knows your space but can't see you. Flat-check DC 11 to target.

immobilized.name: Immobilized
immobilized.note: Can't use actions with the move trait. Can attempt to Escape.

invisible.name: Invisible
invisible.note: Undetected to all visual senses. Can still be detected by other senses.

observed.name: Observed
observed.note: Clearly seen by a creature. No special mechanical effect — default detection state.

paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
paralyzed.note: Off-guard. Can't act except Recall Knowledge and actions that require only the mind. Can attempt flat check DC 11 at start of turn to end.

persistent_damage.name: Persistent Damage
persistent_damage.note: Take specified damage at end of turn. DC 15 flat check to recover (DC 10 with appropriate help).

petrified.name: Petrified
petrified.note: Turned to stone. Can't act or sense anything. AC becomes 9. Immune to most effects.

prone.name: Prone
prone.note: Off-guard (-2 AC). -2 to attack rolls. Must Crawl to move or Stand (1 action) to end. +2 circumstance bonus to AC vs ranged (not modeled here).

quickened.name: Quickened
quickened.note: Gain 1 extra action each turn (specific use restrictions may apply).

restrained.name: Restrained
restrained.note: Off-guard and immobilized. Clumsy 2 equivalent for attacks/checks. Can attempt to Escape.

sickened.name: Sickened
sickened.note: -N status penalty to all checks and DCs. Must succeed Fortitude save to reduce by vomiting (1 action). Effects shown are per rank.

slowed.name: Slowed
slowed.note: Lose N actions at the start of each turn (after regaining actions). Reduces number of actions.

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.note: Lose N actions at start of turn. If value rather than rank, lose actions across rounds. Can't use reactions.

stupefied.name: Stupefied
stupefied.note: -N to Int/Wis/Cha-based checks and spell DCs/attacks. Flat check DC 5+N to cast spells. Effects shown are per rank.

unconscious.name: Unconscious
unconscious.note: Off-guard (-4 AC total). Can't act. Dropped items. Flat-footed. Blinded and unaware.

undetected.name: Undetected
undetected.note: Creature doesn't know your location. Must guess square to target (then flat-check DC 11).

wounded.name: Wounded
wounded.note: When knocked to dying, add wounded value to dying value. Increases by 1 each time you gain dying. Resets on full HP restore.
